subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God! The effulgent rays of the Sun of the Bayán, the Desire of all worlds, have encompassed all, despite the tyranny of the oppressors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد تجلیات انوار شمس بیان مقصود عالمیان کل را احاطه نموده ظلم ظالمین و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @eulogies; reminiscences, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
